title: Character limit for short text column.
excerpt: We use docugen quite a lot, however have discovered some use cases where we would like to limit the characters per entry based upon the amount of space available in the fixed format document we are pushing the text into. …

posts.author: Andrea (Andrea Voss)
posts.cookedHtml: We use docugen quite a lot, however have discovered some use cases where we would like to limit the characters per entry based upon the amount of space available in the fixed format document we are pushing the text into.
